nasb.text: And they all ate and were satisfied; and the broken pieces which they had left over were picked up, twelve baskets full.

esv.text: And they all ate and were satisfied. And what was left over was picked up, twelve baskets of broken pieces.

cnv.text: 他們都吃飽了，把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

ccb.text: 大家都吃饱了，把剩下的零碎收拾起来，竟装满了十二个篮子。

csbs.text: 大家吃了，并且都吃饱了。他们把剩下的碎块收拾起来，装满了十二个篮子。
